name: srt-todo-monorepo
description: Monorepo for SRT Group Todo List developer test

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
